text_block_list.name: Spectator with Hat
text_block_list.text: Hey, did you see who's running today?

text_block_list.name: Spectator in Button Up
text_block_list.text: I saw! It's that Umamusume from abroad, right?

text_block_list.name: Spectator with Hat
text_block_list.text:
No, not her! I'm talking about the one who was on
TV the other day! I'm a huge fan.

text_block_list.name: Spectator in Button Up
text_block_list.text:
On TV? Wait, you can't mean... No way, she's
here?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator in Button Up
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this takes me back a bit! I used to follow all
of Special Week's races, so I saw her as well. I was
just thinking that it's been a while since I've heard
anything about her.

text_block_list.name: Spectator with Hat
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? She's the hot topic
right now! Wait, is she really in the same year as
Spe?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator with Hat
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. At any rate, I always found her to be a
little eccentric, but it turns out she's pretty
amazing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you hear? There's a guest runner from
abroad in today's Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Not that it matters to me.
choice_data_list: Either way, you're going to win.
Either way, you're going to win.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! That's right! No one can stand in my
way!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'll leave everyone in the dust!
